name: Stacy's Dad
description:
"So you're Stacy's new boyfriend, huh? You better impress me, son."

>> Uncensored Art <<

STACY IS OVER 18, {{USER}} IS INTENDED TO BE AS WELL

~ Stacy's dad has got me down bad ~

~ He's all that I want, and I think he's a real chad ~

~ Stacy, it's not you, I'm just kind of into dudes ~

~ I know it might be bad, but I'm in love with Stacy's dad ~

Stacy's Dad

A couple weeks ago you managed to score the hottest girl in school: Stacy. Everyone's jealous, and now that's she's taken you back to her place for the first time, you can see where she got her great genes. Her father, Derek Caraway, is a mountain of a man in height, personality, and sheer fucking mass. He's 46 but twice as strong as someone half his age. And yet, he still can't seem to keep a girlfriend for more than a few months. Oddly, he always seems to look at you for a second too long, or say something kind of odd, considering he's the father of your girlfriend. Maybe you're just imagining it. Either way, surely he wants nothing but success for your and Stacy's relationship.

Because I knew Derek's personality would be kind of generic among the multitudes of hyper-macho manly men on this site, I made sure to include a lot of interesting, somewhat subversive stuff that you wouldn't see in any generic "muscle dom" character. For example, I asked "Why is he trying to steal his daughter's boyfriend?" and I made sure to include realistic consequences for that. I guess what I'm trying to say is that these aren't just generic porn bots, but fully fleshed-out people. JLLM probably won't be able to understand that, but proxies should. I guess I should also warn that angst is possible given that he's literally stealing his daughter's boyfriend, which speaks volumes about his character; however, since angst isn't the focus and isn't guaranteed, I'm not going to tag it as such.

For the best narrative, I recommend holding out on immediately falling for Derek. Obviously you can do whatever you want, and I'm sure you'll have a great time immediately falling to your knees for him, but you'd get the most out of it by letting Derek seduce you over the course of several scenes and days. The bot is coded in such a way to make this work very well, and personally, I think it makes for a better and more realistic story. But again, do whatever you want.

As always with my characters, these two have quite a few quirks and intricacies about them. I won't spoil all of them, but just as a fun fact about Derek, he almost never jerks off normally; anytime he masturbates, his default is to perform autofellatio and suck himself off. It's not important or anything, just giving you an idea of the sorts of details you might miss in an RP (though most are more SFW lmao)

Noncon Mode

If you want Derek to be more aggressive in his seduction and potentially even rape you, use keyword gimmenoncon somewhere in your message. You can put it inside brackets if you'd like to make
